title: Assembly elections 2026 LIVE: Assam CM Himanta holds large rally as he sets out to file nomination from Jalukbari
content: Congress finalises its alliance with Raijor Dal in the Assam Assembly elections after weeks of deadlock

title: Supreme Court quashes copyright case against filmmaker Sujoy Ghosh over his 'Kahaani 2' film
content: The Supreme Court bench allowed Sujoy Ghosh's plea, challenging a Jharkhand High Court's order, which had refused to quash the proceedings pending against him.

title: Union Minister Jayant Chaudhary receives death threat, complaint lodged
content: Jayant Chaudhary, the Minister of State (Independent Charge) of skill development and entrepreneurship, received the threat call from an unidentified number on Thursday (March 19), prompting an immediate review of his security, the official said.

title: Telangana Budget 2026-27 LIVE: Budget speech begins
content: Mr. Vikramarka said that while maintaining strict financial discipline, they are working tirelessly and with full commitment to fulfill the promises made to the people

title: It’s official: Mani Ratnam’s next to star Vijay Sethupathi and Sai Pallavi
content: Legendary director Mani Ratnam is teaming up with Vijay Sethupathi and Sai Pallavi for his next film. The movie is produced by the filmmaker’s own Madras Talkies and Lyca Productions

title: Babri mosque emotion: West Bengal may see Muslim Chief Minister or Deputy CM: Humayun Kabir
content: Humayun Kabir said that his outfit would contest 182 seats in alliance with AIMIM and could emerge as a decisive player in government formation if the verdict produces a fractured mandate

title: Dravidian titans face a new disruptor as Tamil Nadu girds for a high-stakes contest
content: The principal players made compromises to strengthen alliances; M.K. Stalin, to prevent vote spillover, has given a Rajya Sabha berth to the DMDK, while Edappadi Palaniswami roped in the PMK by giving Anbumani a similar deal

title: Government proposal to preload Aadhaar app on phones faced pushback
content: Apple and Samsung, in particular, both had concerns with the proposal due to questions over safety and security, two industry sources said

title: Kerala Assembly polls: K. Sudhakaran returns to Kannur; T.O. Mohanan set to launch campaign
content: Sudhakaran, who had earlier maintained a firm stand on contesting the polls, says his ‘priority now is to ensure Congress’ victory and bring it to power’

title: Anti-establishment X accounts ‘withheld’ in India as takedowns spread
content: Content taken down under Section 69A of the IT Act, 2000 remains visible to users outside India; censorship of posts and handles mocking the government is an “extremely dangerous trend”, says Congress

title: Congress, Raijor Dal finalise alliance; State party gets 11 seats
content: Akhil Gogoi will contest from Sivasagar, a seat he won in the last polls while still in prison on sedition charges for allegedly instigating violence during the Citizenship Amendment Act (CAA) protests.

title: LPG crisis: In Kerala, war reaches the doorsteps
content: The war that broke out in West Asia has impacted lives in Kerala in myriad forms. Expatriates’ travel plans were in disarray, tourism hit the pause button. But it was the unprecedented LPG crisis that put the economy under heavy strain. M.P. Praveen finds out how various segments, from restaurants to rubber industry, are coping with the situation

title: Fighting a looming threat of erasure: The outrage over amendments to trans rights law
content: Protests have erupted across the country, with tens of thousands of people coming out onto the streets, signing petitions online, and campaigning for the withdrawal of the proposed Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Bill, 2026. Ashna Butani and Abhinay Lakshman report on the outrage of trans communities, who say that the Bill violates their fundamental right to gender self-identification

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly elections 2026: Seat-sharing process will be finalised in four days, says Edappadi Palaniswami
content: Making it clear the composition of the alliance had been more or less firmed up, Edappadi Palaniswami said AIADMK’s manifesto would be released in a week

title: Trainee veterinary officer dies in hippopotamus attack in Tyavarekoppa Safari in Shivamogga
content: Officials say that Dr. Sameeksha Reddy, a veterinary officer in training, was attacked by an animal while checking its temperature using non-invasive infrared thermography

title: Uttarkhand CM Pushkar Singh Dhami expands cabinet, inducts five MLAs
content: With the induction of the new Ministers — Khazan Das, Bharat Singh Chaudhary, Madan Kaushik, Pradeep Batra, and Ram Singh Kaida — the Uttarakhand cabinet has reached its maximum strength of 12, officials said

title: With cost of inputs rising and exports disrupted, textile units in Perambalur take a hit
content: Industry sources said the prices of key raw materials such as polyester fibre and synthetic yarn, largely derived from petroleum products, have increased sharply in recent weeks

title: Thoothukudi Class XII girl murder: police arrest 38-year-old man, say he was arrested for similar offence in 2022
content: The 17-year-old girl reportedly went missing on the evening of March 10 after she went to a nearby scrub jungle area

title: Before salt, there was water: why Mahad Satyagraha deserves its centenary
content: The republic must mark the centenary of the Mahad Satyagraha with the seriousness it deserves; it calls for a year of honest reckoning to ask whether the constitutional promise of dignity and freedom from untouchability has become a lived reality for all

title: Cooking gas crisis on the boil across Telangana
content: An LPG shortage triggered by global supply disruptions has begun to ripple across Telangana, hitting restaurants, temples, industries and households alike. While domestic supplies are officially being prioritised, panic bookings have surged, overwhelming systems and fuelling anxiety among consumers. Industry bodies warn of a wider economic fallout, including job losses and disrupted food access, even as authorities insist the situation is under control. N. Ravi Kumar and Siddharth Kumar Singh bring you a ground reality check

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: BJP bets big on Christian votes, names seven candidates from community in two lists
content: The BJP has been raising issues concerning the Christian community as part of its strategy, including extending support to the community in the Munambam land case

title: Andaman's tribal delegation meets Rahul Gandhi, raises concern over Great Nicobar project
content: The delegation expressed apprehensions about the potential adverse impact of the project on the fragile ecosystem of Great Nicobar Island and its indigenous tribal communities, says the Congress statement

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Malampuzha poised for LDF-BJP rematch, UDF takes desperate gamble
content: Though the Bharatiya Janata Party has been making visible inroads in this left bastion, the Left Democratic Front continues to dominate in most panchayats. The constituency is seeing a rematch between LDF’s A. Prabhakaran and BJP’s C. Krishnakumar. UDF has fielded A. Suresh, a former personal assistant to V.S. Achuthanandan

title: A three-day Bihar Nursery and Green-Tech Conclave 2026 in Patna from March 21
content: It will be a first-of-its-kind, three-day national horticulture conclave; entrepreneurs and start-ups to get opportunity to present their business ideas through “Chanakya Horti-Pitch” initiative

title: As West Asia war threatens gas supply, remembering a gas grid India never built
content: India’s push for the National Coal Gasification Mission to secure energy independence recalls a visionary 1955 proposal by Syed Husain Zaheer; initially dismissed by policymakers, Zaheer’s plan for a national gas grid was tragically vindicated by the 1973 global oil shock

title: Defectors from Congress in BJP’s first list of 88 candidates for Assam election
content: Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma seeks re-election from Jalukbari for the sixth straight term, while Deputy Speaker Numal Momin and Minister Nandita Garlosa are dropped

title: Centre ensuring fuel security despite global turmoil, says Ramchander Rao
content: Mr. Rao was speaking at the BJP State office after participating in the Ugadi celebrations marking the advent of the ‘Sri Parabhava Nama Samvatsara’

title: Farmers cautioned as light rain and thunderstorms are likely across Andhra Pradesh till March 22
content: India Meteorological Department, Amaravati, says there will be widespread rain until March 22 in the State, and thereafter isolated rainfall is expected

title: Budget will be acceptable to all sections of society, says  Deputy Chief Minister
content: Bhatti hoped that in this ‘Parabhava’ year, evil forces would be defeated and the State would flourish with agricultural abundance and prosperity

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: The Left grapples with shifting loyalties
content: Ahead of the 2026 Assembly polls, six former legislators, four from the CPI(M) and two from the CPI, severed their communist ties and are now gearing up to contest from the rival camps or as Independents. The happenings, rather uncommon in Kerala, have garnered much attention.

title: Rift widens among Bihar Opposition after Rajya Sabha poll defeat
content: The ruling NDA leaders now have dared Opposition RJD to expel its legislator from the party while, coalition Communist Party of India-Marxist-Leninist (Liberation) has accused Congress of making their vote go to ‘waste’

title: Supreme Court dismisses plea seeking enquiry into CITES violation by Jamnagar-based animal rescue centre and trust
content: The petition had sought a judicial direction to the Union government, Central Zoo Authority, Directorate General of Foreign Trade and the Wildlife Crime Control Bureau to produce the entire record of the permissions, recognitions and import/export licences granted to the rescue and rehabilitation centre and the welfare trust since 2019

title: Delhi court acquits two booked under UAPA after they spent eight years in jail
content: Additional Sessions Judge Amit Bansal of the Patiala House Courts observed that the prosecution has failed to prove the charges slapped on the accused, Jamsheed Zahoor Paul and Parvaiz Rashid

title: Delhi HC issues notice on plea seeking removal of India’s patent head
content: The petition has been filed by the All India Patent Officers’ Welfare Association (AIPOWA) alleging that Mr Pandit’s appointment was “illegal and arbitrary” and made in violation of prescribed eligibility criteria

title: Facing evictions, Gulmarg hoteliers withdraw petitions ‘to settle issue with J&K Govt.’
content: Official sources said the J&K government, unlike the Lieutenant Governor administration, intended to form a committee to look into the lease issues and auctions

title: 24 States, U.T.s set aside funds for new rural jobs scheme
content: They use past expenditure under the MGNREGA as the baseline as the Centre is yet to notify the formula for determining the State-wise normative allocations under the VB-GRAM (G) Act

title: West Asia troubles to delay India’s FTA talks with GCC countries and Israel
content: The FTAs with the UK and the EU are still on track to be implemented and ratified, respectively, this year

title: Iran may let more Indian vessels pass Hormuz Strait: Lloyds List
content: The maritime data company has reported that nine ships have exited through Iran’s corridor in Strait of Hormuz; reliable sources in India, meanwhile, said that with the situation in West Asia escalating further, Indian ships stuck in the strait for more than two weeks have been asked to ‘stay put’ for now after Israeli strikes on Iran’s largest gas fields

title: Global cooperation is crucial to tackle AI bias and risks, says PM
content: While AI may enhance human capabilities, the ultimate responsibility for decision-making must remain with humans, stresses Modi; India is working to create diverse datasets that represent its plurality and accommodate regional languages, he adds

title: ‘Family first’ in BJP list of bypoll candidates in Nagaland, Tripura
content: The party’s candidate for the Koridang seat in Nagaland is the son of the deceased MLA, while his counterpart in Tripura’s Dharmanagar is the son-in-law of a former contestant

title: Book offering behind-the-scenes glimpse of political strategy launched
content: Speaking at the launch event, Minister Palanivel Thiaga Rajan says the book distills the author’s experiences, covering a wide range of scenarios with clarity and will serve as a learning curve for anyone entering politics or campaign-related fields

title: Grand Ugadi celebrations organised in Andhra
content: In the evening, Radhotsavam was held for the processional idols of Sri Bhramaramba Mallikarjuna Swamy on the streets of the temple town

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: CPI (M) unrelenting in demand for six seats, stalemate in talks with DMK continues
content: The DMK’s argument is that it cannot part with more seats as it has accommodated additional parties in the alliance and has already given three more seats to the Congress.

title: T.N. Assembly’s annual sitting days declined from 64 in the first term to 32 in the 16th: PRS study
content: According to an analysis by PRS Legislative Research, the 16th Assembly, whose tenure began on May 11, 2021, and is set to conclude on May 10, 2026, met for only 155 days, the lowest for a full-term Assembly since 1952

title: Luka drops 60, gets MVP chants from Heat crowd
content: Luka Doncic scored 60 points, the first Laker to do so since Kobe Bryant's career finale in 2016, as L.A. won in Miami to push its season-best win streak to eight games.

title: UNC's Davis: Fatigue not to blame for collapse
content: In a series of terse exchanges with reporters after VCU's 82-78 OT win, North Carolina coach Hubert Davis said he didn't think his team was tired and said it was "my decision" when asked why he had gone with a six-man rotation in the waning minutes.

title: LeBron ties Parish's record with 1,611th game
content: LeBron James tied Robert Parish for the NBA's all-time games-played mark, with the Hall of Famer saying James is "deserving" of breaking the record.

title: Duke dodges scare, tips cap to McNamara, Siena
content: Duke barely avoided a shocking upset to open the NCAA tournament, with the No. 1 overall seed having to rally from 13 points down and going ahead for good in the final five minutes to beat 16th-seeded Siena 71-65 on Thursday.

title: Sources: NFL to vote on Raiders succession plan
content: NFL owners are scheduled to vote on a Raiders succession plan that gives Silver Lake co-chief executive officer Egon Durban the option to purchase a majority stake in the team from longtime owner Mark Davis, sources told ESPN.

title: Wemby's game winner puts Spurs back in playoffs
content: Victor Wembanyama nailed a go-ahead 17-foot fadeaway with 1.1 seconds left Thursday night, and the Spurs clinched a postseason berth for the first time in six seasons.

title: BYU's Dybantsa to mull future in upcoming weeks
content: BYU freshman AJ Dybantsa said he expects to decide on his playing future in the "next couple of weeks."

title: NYU's 91-game win streak ends in D-III Final Four
content: Two-time defending champion NYU lost 60-52 to Scranton in the Final Four of the Division III NCAA tournament on Thursday night, ending the Violets' 91-game winning streak.

title: 🏀 Women's tournament: Bracket breakdown
content: ESPN talent cast their votes for which foursome will reach the Final Four. Will Phoenix be full of chalk?

title: LeBron in Miami -- where he was at his career best
content: When was LeBron James' peak? There's an argument to be made for 2013, when his Miami Heat did not lose for 52 straight days.

title: Ranking the top 50 men's college basketball players who could define March Madness
content: From mid-major leaders to national superstars, here's who could impact their teams' NCAA tournament runs.

title: 10 great signings, six great trades: The NFL free agency moves that Walder graded with an 'A'
content: We've graded more than 60 signings and trades over the past few weeks. But only 16 moves received top marks. We ranked those deals.

title: Tracking NFL free agency: We recapped all the signings, trades and cuts from March
content: We followed every signing, trade, cut, contract restructures and other moves over the course of two weeks.

title: Where was Team USA's star closer?! How pitching restrictions rocked an otherwise epic WBC
content: The 2026 World Baseball Classic was another success story. But issues with pitcher usage are still holding it back.

content: The designated hitter struggled early in his career -- but he's now a powerhouse hitter and crucial vocal leader in a young A's clubhouse.

title: Yates' rankings for the NFL draft: Sizing up the top 50 prospects, plus scouting reports
content: Who are the best players in this year's NFL draft class? Where do they stand out? Field Yates stacks his top 50 prospects.

title: Kiper's mock draft: How free agency shook up first-round landing spots for top prospects
content: How will top prospects come off the board in Round 1? Mel Kiper Jr. projects the draft's first 32 picks.

title: Weekend predictions: Arsenal or Man City to win Carabao final? Who takes Madrid derby?
content: From a cup final in England to a Madrid derby and relegation six-pointer, another wild weekend of action awaits as Julien Laurens picks out the best games to watch in Europe.

title: Champions League quarterfinal preview, predictions: Barcelona to keep rolling?
content: We have four incredible quarterfinals, including Barcelona-Atlético. Bill Connelly previews and predicts the action.

title: Is USMNT striker group the best it's ever had for a World Cup?
content: For the past 20 years, the USMNT has never truly had one striker it could reliably depend on. Now, ahead of this summer's World Cup, it has four.

content: As you prepare for tipoff, here are our best bets for the first round, plus picks for the new Eliminator game.

content: It's time for the 2026 NCAA wrestling championships! This year crowned the first women's tournament champion. Check out how to watch now.

title: 20 contenders, 20 lingering weaknesses: Barnwell fixes roster holes as free agency slows down
content: Will Aaron Rodgers check the QB box for the Steelers? Can the Seahawks find running back help? And is there something the Chiefs can do at cornerback?

title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United make move for Newcastle's Guimarães
content: Manchester United have reportedly made a move for Bruno Guimarães, while Europe's biggest clubs keep an eye on Bournemouth's Rayan. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: What do the first two rounds of a perfect draft look like?
content: Tristan H. Cockcroft and Eric Karabell reveal the ideal outcome for the first two rounds of a 10-team draft from any starting draft position.

title: Eight standout fights on the PFL slate over the next five weeks
content: Champion Costello van Steenis, fan-favorite Paul Hughes and familiar names Bryan Battle, Sergio Pettis and more litter the PFL's upcoming schedule.

title: Stock Market LIVE Updates, Sensex Today: Sensex Gains 1,000 Points, Nifty Up 300, Rupee Falls
content: Stock Market LiveUpdates Sensex Today: The Nifty50 and the Sensex are expected to open higher on Friday.

title: How Sailor's Run Exposed French Aircraft Carrier's Exact Location Amid Iran War
content: The French Navy's flagship, the Charles de Gaulle, is reportedly the only nuclear-powered aircraft carrier in operation outside the US military.

title: "Who Will Compensate For Harassment?" Elvish Yadav After Court Sets Him Free
content: A case was registered against Bigg Boss OTT winner Elvish Yadav for using snake venom as a recreational drug at rave parties in Noida.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Dhurandhar, And The Enduring Ghosts Of Kashmir Valley
content: Dhurandhar is a story of the relentless war waged by Pakistan against India, not all of Pakistan but the terrorists it harbours, and the agenda it upholds.

title: Iran Releases Video Of Mojtaba Giving Religious Lessons Amid Health Concerns
content: The 56-year-old cleric took over as Iran's Supreme Leader after his father, Ali Khamenei, was assassinated in a US-Israeli strike on February 28. But he has remained out of the public eye since the start of the war, fuelling speculation about his hea

title: Inside Denmark's Plan To Blow Up Greenland's Runways To Prevent US Attack
content: With US President Donald Trump's rhetoric on Greenland getting sharper and urgent, Denmark was forced to develop a desperate contingency plan.

title: F-35 Hit Over Iran? Hi-Tech Solution To Low-Tech Problem Likely Backfired
content: Iran developed air defence systems that use passive infrared sensors rather than radar to target aircraft like F-35A. This method proved effective in Yemen when used by Iranian-backed Houthi rebels

title: "High-Risk Environment": India Asks Airlines To Avoid 11 Airspaces Amid Iran War
content: The identified high-risk zone includes airspace over Iran, Israel, Lebanon, Saudi Arabia, Bahrain, Oman, Iraq, Jordan, the UAE, Qatar and Kuwait, covering all flight levels.

title: Congress, Raijor Dal Finalise Alliance, State Party Gets 11 seats
content: Akhil Gogoi will contest from Sivasagar, a seat he won in the last polls while still in prison on sedition charges for allegedly instigating violence during the Citizenship Amendment Act protests.

title: "F**k Tel Aviv": Mamdani's Wife Under Fire Over Past Posts, Using N-Word
content: The reports said accounts on X and Tumblr were believed to have been used by Rama Duwaji during her late teenage years and early twenties

title: Israel-Iran War LIVE: Drone Attack Causes Fire At Kuwait Oil Refinery
content: US Israel Iran War News LIVE Updates: Iran has been striking its Persian Gulf neighbours' energy facilities since the war started on February 28, and has made the Strait of Hormuz shipping channel, nearly impassable.

title: US Approves Over $16 Billion In Arms Sales To Gulf Nations Hit By Iran War
content: The biggest single sale is of lower-tier air and missile defense sensor radars, which are designed to track high-speed targets and give data to a missile defense network, to Kuwait for $8 billion.

title: The Myth Of Stealth: Iran Puts US' Prized F-35's Name To The Test
content: Every aircraft returns a radar signal. The question is how much. Stealth engineering begins with geometry

title: Video: Moment When US F-35 Stealth Fighter Was Hit In Skies Above Iran
content: It would mark the first known instance of Iran hitting one of the US military's most advanced and expensive aircraft in the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.

title: Tamil Nadu Man Wanted A Scenic Selfie, But Slipped And Fell 100 Feet Down
content: The man was pulled to safety in the early hours of Friday and shifted for medical evaluation. Officials said he is stable but under observation.

title: Iranian Strikes On Qatar's LNG Crown Jewel Will Reshape Future Of Gas
content: The latest strikes have damaged two of the plant's production trains, representing a combined 12.8 million tons of annual output capacity, or about 17% of Qatar's LNG exports.

title: Palaniswami meets Shah in Delhi to discuss sharing of seats
content: e-Paper The View From India Looking at World Affairs from the Indian perspective . first day first show news and reviews from the world of cinema and streaming . the weekly newsletter from science writers takes the jargon out of science and puts the fun in!

title: 'Destiny got me here': Samson on Dhoni as CSK drops 1st Sanju-MSD video | Watch
content: Sanju Samson's long-held dream of playing alongside MS Dhoni has materialized as he joins Chennai Super Kings for IPL 2026.  This move follows Samson's stellar performance, earning him Player of the Tournament in the T20 World Cup 2026, where he set new Indian batting records.  Fans eagerly anticipate this exciting new chapter.

title: UP man thrashed to death by in-laws; wife gagged, tied, forced to watch assault
content: A 30-year-old man, Vishnu Yadav, was brutally murdered by his in-laws in Lucknow. His wife was held captive while her father, mother, and sisters attacked Vishnu with wooden planks and an iron rod. The family harbored a grudge over the marriage that occurred four years ago. Police have arrested six family members and recovered the murder weapons.

title: Super Micro Computer employees charged for smuggling Nvidia chips to China
content: Three individuals linked to AI server maker Super Micro Computer have been charged by the US Attorney's Office for allegedly smuggling at least $2.5 billion of American AI technology to China. The indictment claims a complex scheme involving rerouting US-made servers through Taiwan to China, with measures taken to conceal their origin.

title: Mohsin Naqvi’s PCB termed ‘weak’, accused of ‘kneeling before players’
content: Pakistan cricket faces renewed criticism after a T20 World Cup exit and ODI series loss. Former opener Ahmed Shehzad alleges the PCB built up a select group of players, now failing to deliver, while neglecting accountability and player development. He claims the board's weakness empowers these stars, hindering genuine progress and leaving fans disillusioned.

title: 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge’ inches close to Rs 150 crore
content: Aditya Dhar's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge,' starring Ranveer Singh, has exceeded expectations, earning over Rs 100 crore on its opening Friday. The film's premiere shows on March 18, 2026, garnered Rs 43 crore, contributing to a domestic total nearing Rs 150 crore.

title: Why is stock market rallying today? BSE Sensex rises over 1,000 points
content: Stock market today: Benchmark indices Nifty50 and BSE Sensex rallied in trade on Friday after a big selloff on Thursday that saw markets tank over 3%. The rally added more than Rs 6 lakh crore to the total market capitalisation of BSE-listed companies, taking it to Rs 432 lakh crore.

title: Years after Zuckerberg called it 'the next frontier’, Meta shuts down Horizon Worlds
content: Meta is ending its virtual reality social network Horizon Worlds on Quest headsets. The app will be removed from the Quest store by March 2026 and fully discontinued on VR devices by June 2026. Horizon Worlds will then operate solely as a mobile application.

title: IPL 2026: Complete list of injured and unavailable players
content: IPL 2026 faces a challenge with numerous player injuries. Key bowlers like Harshit Rana and Nathan Ellis are out for the season. Sam Curran and Jack Edwards will also miss the entire tournament. Pat Cummins and Josh Hazlewood will be absent for initial matches. Lockie Ferguson and Mitchell Starc's early availability is uncertain. Matheesha Pathirana is also sidelined.

title: SRH’s IPL 2026 plans shaken as key all-rounder ruled out following Cummins’ injury
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad faces a blow as Jack Edwards is ruled out of IPL 2026 due to injury. Australian pacer Nathan Ellis and England all-rounder Sam Curran will also miss the season with hamstring and groin issues respectively. Ishan Kishan will captain SRH in Pat Cummins' absence as they begin their campaign against RCB on March 28.

title: DGCA asks airlines to avoid 9 airspaces amid escalating Middle East tensions
content: Indian airlines may continue operating over Oman and Saudi Arabia, subject to conditions. The regulator said flights must not operate below FL 320, or 32,000 feet, in specified parts of these airspaces. About the nine airspaces, the DGCA asked airlines to "refrain from operating within the affected airspace...at all flight levels and altitudes".

title: HDFC Bank shares down 7.5% in just 2 days after Atanu Chakraborty’s exit; what’s the outlook?
content: With the latest slide, the stock has fallen around 7.5 per cent over the past two trading sessions. The sustained pressure on ADRs points to ongoing investor unease after the sudden resignation of chairman Atanu Chakraborty.

title: Iran continues targeting energy sites: Key Kuwait oil refinery on fire again after drone strike
content: Kuwait's Mina Al-Ahmadi oil refinery faced another Iranian drone attack on Friday. Fires erupted at several units. This follows a similar incident a day earlier. Firefighters are working to control the blaze. The attacks are part of a wider escalation in the Gulf region. Energy supplies and global markets are affected

title: MLB trade rumors: Braves linked with Yankees shortstop in $3.4M deal
content: Atlanta Braves are reportedly eyeing New York Yankees shortstop Anthony Volpe in a potential trade. This move addresses Atlanta's shortstop needs during Ha-Seong Kim's recovery and New York's dissatisfaction with Volpe's offensive output. The deal could see Mauricio Dubón head to the Bronx, offering defensive flexibility for the Yankees while Atlanta gains a younger, controllable talent.

title: NHL GM meetings spark debate as Oilers get Leon Draisaitl injury update
content: NHL general manager conferences generated tension between league officials, as the discussions about rules and refereeing became the leading ones. In the meantime, the Edmonton Oilers were given some important news on the injury status of Leon Draisaitl after his recent loss to the Nashville Predators. This is one of the most crucial NHL injury updates ever because he is supposed to get back before the playoffs.

title: Tom Brady’s jab about Jayden Daniels’ mother Regina sparks fan reaction
content: Tom Brady sparked buzz ahead of the Fanatics Flag Football Classic with a playful but pointed joke about Jayden Daniels and his mother, Regina Jackson. The comment drew laughs because it tapped into Daniels’ injury-hit 2025 season and ongoing public interest in his close relationship with Jackson. With multiple NFL stars in attendance, Brady’s quick wit stole the spotlight, while Daniels handled the moment calmly, letting the humor land without escalating it.

title: 'Hostage' drama in Delhi: Nigerian detainees lock up doctor, IB & FRRO officials
content: Foreign detainees at the Lampur detention centre held 10-12 staff members hostage, including a doctor, during a routine visit. The situation escalated when detainees became aggressive, pelting stones and injuring four officials. Police intervened to rescue the staff, and a case has been registered against the detained Nigerian nationals.

title: No public appearance, now a video: Where is Iran’s supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei?
content: Iran's new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, has surfaced in a teaching video amid speculation about his health following his father's death.  He recently called for national unity and threatened the Strait of Hormuz.  US officials, including Donald Trump, have expressed uncertainty about his condition, with reports suggesting he may have been injured.

title: 'Doesn’t deserve a place': Shaheen Afridi blasted by former Pakistan captain
content: Former Pakistan captain Rashid Latif has stated that Shaheen Shah Afridi's current form does not warrant a place in the T20I playing XI.  Latif believes Afridi must first regain his position in the team before any captaincy discussions can be considered, citing recent struggles in both T20 and ODI formats.

title: Rupee breaches 93 per dollar for first time amid Iran war oil shock; down 19 paise in early trade
content: The Indian rupee hit a record low of 93.12 against the US dollar on Friday, driven by escalating Middle East tensions and soaring crude oil prices. Despite this currency weakness, domestic equity markets staged a significant recovery. Analysts anticipate continued pressure on the rupee as foreign investors withdraw funds, potentially impacting India's growth and inflation.

title: Surat man wins Rs 3.2 lakh compensation after failed ATM withdrawal of Rs 10,000
content: A consumer court ordered Bank of Baroda to pay Rs 3.28 lakh compensation for failing to reverse a failed Rs 10,000 ATM withdrawal for nearly nine years. The bank was held liable for not proving the transaction's success, despite the customer's repeated attempts to resolve the issue.

title: US hits Iran's Karaj missile plant; satellite images show before-and-after impact
content: US forces struck an Iranian missile manufacturing facility in Karaj as part of "Operation Epic Fury," causing extensive damage and rendering the site inoperable. This action is part of a broader US campaign to counter Iran's proliferation and maritime threats. Military assessments indicate a significant decline in Iran's missile launch capacity, though risks from dispersed capabilities and proxy forces remain.

title: Sanju Samson arrives at CSK with big task: Revive Chennai’s IPL fortunes
content: Sanju Samson makes a grand entry to Chennai Super Kings, mirroring MS Dhoni's arrival after a T20 World Cup triumph. His primary challenge is to revive CSK's batting consistency and lead them back to IPL supremacy. Samson, now free from international proving pressure, aims to deliver explosive starts and handle wicketkeeping duties, learning from Dhoni himself.

title: How Iran's strikes on Qatar's Ras Laffan, world's largest LNG hub will impact India
content: India gets around 40% of its LNG requirements from Qatar. Reacting to the damage to key energy infrastructure in the Middle East, External Affairs Ministry spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal said, “India had previously called for the avoidance of targeting civilian infrastructure, including energy infrastructure, across the region.”

title: 'Dilli hai bhai sabki dhadkan': Delhi falls back in love with football after 7 years
content: It took 2,587 days for top-tier club football to return to Delhi. And then it took a while for the stands to get occupied. But when they did -- for SC Delhi vs Jamshedpur FC at the Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium -- by 6,372 fans, it was met by loud chants, dhol beats, and deafening celebrations despite rain in the air.

title: 3 IIT Bombay students on quick trip to Lonavala to see sunrise killed in crash
content: Three IIT-Bombay students died on the Mumbai-Pune expressway after their car rear-ended a truck while attempting to overtake. The vehicle flipped multiple times before hitting a safety railing near the Panvel exit. Police are investigating the incident, with an FIR lodged against the unidentified truck driver.

title: 'Ustaad Bhagat Singh' BO day 1: Film cross Rs 9 crore
content: Pawan Kalyan's 'Ustaad Bhagat Singh' has kicked off its box office run with a strong opening, surpassing Rs 9 crore by early afternoon on its first day.  The film's impressive advance bookings and wide release have fueled its momentum. While fans are reportedly pleased, social media reactions suggest a mixed reception for this mass entertainer.

title: 'Rockets flying around': Middle East war leaves England cricket short of balls
content: Dukes, a manufacturer that has been in operation since 1760, supplies red balls for Test and first-class cricket in England. Around 4,000 to 5,000 balls are produced for each summer season, which begins on April 3.

title: Oil prices today: Crude eases after spike as Trump, Netanyahu seek to ease concerns over Iran war
content: Global crude prices saw a dip on Friday. Statements from US President Donald Trump and Israeli prime minister Benjamin Netanyahu helped calm fears of more attacks on energy facilities. Brent crude moved towards $107 a barrel. West Texas Intermediate for May hovered around $94. This follows a sharp rally due to supply disruptions in the Persian Gulf region.

title: 'To secure justice': RG Kar victim’s mother seeks BJP ticket from Bengal's Panihati
content: The mother of an RG Kar victim announced her intention to contest assembly elections as a BJP candidate from Panihati, seeking justice for her daughter and advocating for women's safety. This decision has drawn sharp criticism from 'Reclaim the Night' protesters, who deem it an unfortunate choice given the BJP's past actions.

title: ‘Your husband will die’: How Nashik astrologer used fear to blackmail, assault woman
content: A retired Merchant Navy officer, Ashok Kumar Kharat, has been arrested in Nashik. He allegedly posed as an astrologer and repeatedly raped a woman for over three years. The accused was remanded in police custody. A Special Investigation Team has been formed to probe the case.

title: Varun Chakravarthy used his skills incorrectly at T20 World Cup: Amit Mishra
content: For former India leg-spinner Amit Mishra, the issue wasn’t about Chakravarthy being "decoded" but about execution under pressure.

title: 75+ Eid messages, greetings, wishes and quotes to share
content: Eid-ul-Fitr, the "Festival of Breaking the Fast," celebrates the end of Ramadan with communal prayers, feasts, and charity. Established in 7th-century Arabia, it signifies victory, spiritual renewal, and strengthened community bonds. Celebrations include vibrant markets, family gatherings, and the exchange of gifts and well wishes, embodying gratitude and forgiveness.

title: Rs 40 crore in, Rs 20 crore out: ED maps surrogacy racket in Telangana, Andhra
content: The Enforcement Directorate has uncovered a massive financial network linked to alleged illegal surrogacy and baby selling by Dr. Pachipala Namratha. Nearly Rs 40 crore in cash deposits and Rs 20 crore in withdrawals were observed, alongside the provisional attachment of 50 properties worth Rs 29.7 crore across multiple cities.

title: 'Strength behind my Man's success': Sakshi pens post for Dhoni's father
content: MS Dhoni's wife Sakshi Dhoni shared a heartfelt post for Pan Singh Dhoni, calling him the "strength behind my Man's success." She praised his inspiring journey and role in shaping MS Dhoni. Meanwhile, AB de Villiers suggested Dhoni should bat higher for Chennai Super Kings or consider a mentoring role.

title: Big 12's top newcomers and what their coaches think
content: the big 12 football landscape is being reshaped by 2026 newcomers . the list includes some of the most high-profile transfers in the country . this breakdown looks at why they matter and how their own coaches and GMs expect them to fit .

title: Broncos are all-in, and Dolphins are all-out, but does either strategy make sense?
content: the Broncos traded their first-, third- and fourth-round picks in this year's draft . they traded a wideout for Jaylen Waddle and a fourth round pick . the studs continue to indicate that they're tearing down their roster . a new regime appears to be going down that way .

title: CFB spring buzz: Bama expectations, Texas upgrades and a freshman QB making waves
content: Alabama coach Kalen DeBoer says it's more than his 20-8 record in the past two seasons there . "we're going to do things the right way," he says in a sit-down interview . he is looking for his first college football playoff appearance with the Trojans .

title: Women's tournament odds: UConn odds-on favorite; UCLA, Texas, South Carolina next
content: the shortest odds for a pre-tournament favorite since 2018, was also the last time UConn was favored going into the tournament . the SEC dominates the next four spots between Texas (+700), south Carolina (+800), LSU (16-1), Vanderbilt (50-1) and Michigan (80-1) .

title: Ranking the 25 best players in women's March Madness
content: the 2026 women's NCAA tournament opens on friday (11:30 a.m. ET, ESPN2). the forward for no. 1 overall seed UConn remains on top ahead of the tournament . strong's teammate, Azzi Fudd , joins her in the top five .

title: What the 2026 WNBA CBA means for league, players, salaries
content: a verbal agreement on a new CBA between the WNBA and players' union will change the landscape of the league . the agreement comes seven months after the players opted out of their collective bargaining agreement . there were concerns over whether the 2026 season would start on time .

title: NBA debut to March Madness: Sandfort surprises brother in Nebraska win
content: payton Sandfort caught a 3 a.m. taxi and a flight to surprise his younger brother . he made his first NBA debut in the Thunder's 121-92 win against the Brooklyn Nets . his brother, a junior forward who signed a two-way contract with the Thunder earlier this month, was on his home court .
